title: vim
html:
vim

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

vim -c ':redir! >/path/to/output-file | echo "DATA" | redir END | q'

Inherit

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

vim -c ':py ...'

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

vim -c ':lua ...'

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

vim
